chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1609 of 2022 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.7243/2922 2.For hearing of main case. 28.02.2025 Mr.Abdul Moiz Jaferii, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Muhabbat Hussain Awan, Ms.Afsheen Aman, & Ms.Masooda Siraj, Advocates for Respondent (F.B.R) In view of the judgment passed by Hon’ble Supreme Court of Pakistan reported as 2023 SCMR 1716 (Collector of Customs, Customs House, Lahore & another v. M/s.Wasim Radio Traders, Lahore & others), this petition is not maintainable, hence, hereby dismissed. Judge Judge nasir
